summary: Frontend-only e2e test for new 'reprint invoice' button in Delivery page order-details dialog (admin /delivery). Logged in as admin@maestroegp.com, opened all-orders tab, found 12 delivery cards, opened first order — dialog rendered with items/total (18,000 IQD), reprint-invoice-btn present with exact label 'إعادة طباعة الفاتورة'. Click triggered window.open (browser print fallback since no printer configured — expected). Then filtered by 'مرفوض', opened order #5002 — rejected badge + rejection block visible, reprint button rendered and clicked successfully (popup opened, no crash, dialog stayed mounted, no error elements detected). FIFO change in IncomingOrderCall.jsx reviewed as code-only per main agent guidance — not e2e tested. All 3 scenarios PASS.
critical_code_review_comments: Delivery.js is ~2300+ lines — recommend splitting into smaller focused modules (tabs into separate components) for maintainability.
reprintOrderInvoice() catches all errors silently and falls back to browser print without logging — consider console.warn on the catch for easier debugging.

IncomingOrderCall.jsx FIFO sort uses string comparison on created_at (ISO 8601 strings sort lexicographically correctly for UTC, but if any non-UTC offsets sneak in this can misorder). Consider sorting by Date.parse(created_at) to be safe.

reprintInvoiceBrowser fallback uses setTimeout 400ms then w.print() — popup blockers in some browsers may close window before print fires; consider awaiting w.onload or using w.document.addEventListener('readystatechange').
seed_data_creation: No new seed data. Used existing seeded rejected order #5002.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reprint button verified working for both normal and rejected orders. FIFO change in IncomingOrderCall.jsx was code-review only per request (not e2e tested due to difficulty simulating multiple concurrent incoming orders). Order #5002 exists in the seed data with rejection metadata. Browser-print fallback is triggered when no printer is configured — this manifests as a window.open('about:blank') popup, acceptable behavior in headless test env.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found. New reprint feature works end-to-end including for rejected orders. Order-details dialog regression confirmed clean.
